top_signals.title: South Africa Targets Key Mining Registry by End of March
top_signals.summary: South Africa expects to fully launch a long-awaited database of mineral rights within 10 months, according to a senior official.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin's brutal sell-off sparks a flurry of trading in related stocks, including one big bullish bet
top_signals.summary: The year has been a rocky one for the flagship cryptocurrency, but traders aren't backing away from the space.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Pentagon blacklists Alibaba, BYD and Baidu over alleged military ties
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: McEwen sees Grey Fox adding 15 years to Ontario mine complex
top_signals.summary: A PFS report forecasts annual gold production of 87,000 oz. from 2028 through 2041.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: First Atlantic, Vema partner to unlock hydrogen potential in Newfoundland
top_signals.summary: Locally produced hydrogen at the Pipestone project could support on-site energy needs for a large-scale nickel and cobalt mining district, companies say.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
